name: yt-dlp
description: Root scripts for the fork (web UI + API)

scripts.install:web: npm install && npm --prefix web/client install && node scripts/web-venv.mjs
scripts.dev:client: cross-env GOMAXPROCS=2 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm --prefix web/client run dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
